ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-19-2009 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A)&(D). TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 6/22/09 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET IN DEPT. 502. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT ALL ESSENTIAL PARTIES HAVE BEEN SERVED OR APPEARED AND NO INFORMAL AGREEMENT WILL RESULT IN LATE ADDED DEFENDANTS. THE COURT ORDERED ALL DOE DEFENDANTS DISMISSED BY THE TIME OF TRIAL. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 4/20/09. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL SUPPORT PROPOSITION 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 5/8/09. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (206)
